mapper.select:
SELECT t.venueCode,t.betAmount,t.validAmount,t.winLossAmount FROM ( SELECT venue_code as venueCode, IFNULL(SUM(bet_amount), 0) as betAmount, IFNULL(SUM(win_loss_amount), 0) as winLossAmount, IFNULL(SUM(valid_amount), 0) as validAmount FROM report_user_venue_win_lose WHERE user_account = #{vo.userAccount} AND site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND day_hour_millis >= #{vo.startTime} AND day_hour_millis <= #{vo.endTime} GROUP BY venue_code) AS t
order by t.winLossAmount DESC
order by t.betAmount
order by t.winLossAmount
order by t.validAmount
order by t.betAmount desc
order by t.winLossAmount desc
order by t.validAmount desc

select venue_code from report_user_venue_win_lose
group by venue_code order by venue_code

select currency, IFNULL(count(distinct user_id),0) as bettorCount, IFNULL(sum(bet_count),0) as betCount, IFNULL(sum(bet_amount),0) as betAmount, IFNULL(sum(valid_amount),0) as validBetAmount, IFNULL(-sum(win_loss_amount),0) as winlossAmount, IFNULL(-sum(user_win_loss_amount),0) as userWinlossAmount, IFNULL(sum(tips_amount),0) as tipsAmount from report_user_venue_win_lose
group by currency

select count(1) from ( select venue_code, currency from report_user_venue_win_lose
group by venue_code,currency ) t

SELECT day_millis as dayMillis, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS userCount, IFNULL(sum(bet_count),0) as betCount, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(FROM_UNIXTIME(day_millis / 1000), @@session.time_zone, #{timezone}), '%Y-%m-%d') AS myDay FROM report_user_venue_win_lose WHERE site_code = #{siteCode} AND day_millis BETWEEN #{startMillis} AND #{endMillis} GROUP BY day_millis
